title: pyrus decora
intro: Pyrus decora, also known as the Japanese flowering quince, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pyrus decora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pyrus decora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
